_comment2: Rename this file to config.json and adjust the values to your setup.
_comment_server_port: The port on which the TS6 Viewer web interface will be available. Usually '8080'
_comment_theme: Choose between 'light' or 'dark' for the viewer theme. Usually 'dark'
_comment_refresh_interval: How often the viewer should auto-refresh (in seconds). Usually '60'

teamspeak6._comment_base_url: The WebQuery HTTP or endpoint of your TeamSpeak 6 server. Usually http://192.168.178.2:10080.
teamspeak6._comment_api_key: Your TeamSpeak 6 API key. It is shown ONCE in the server logs on first startup. If lost, create a new one.
teamspeak6._comment_host: The ServerQuery host. Usually the IP address of your TeamSpeak 6 server or 'localhost' if TS6 Viewer runs on the same machine.
teamspeak6._comment_port: The ServerQuery port. Usually 10022 for SSH.
teamspeak6._comment_user: The ServerQuery user. Usually 'serveradmin' by default.
teamspeak6._comment_password: The ServerQuery password. It is shown ONCE in the server logs on first startup. If lost, create a new one or reset it via the TeamSpeak 6 server console.
teamspeak6._comment_enable_detailed_client_info: Whether to fetch detailed client info (like mic mute status) for each client. This can increase load on the server, so set to 'false' if you experience performance issues.
teamspeak6._comment_server_id: The ID of the virtual server you want to display. Default is usually '1'.
